info.title: flutter-agent
info.summary: Local Flutter requirement refinement service: turns one-liners into spec / architecture / task breakdowns using DeepSeek (or any OpenAI-compatible model) plus Markdown skill files.
info.description:
Two ways to call:

* **Canonical**: `POST /v1/refine` returns a strongly-typed `RefineResponse` (classify / spec / architecture / breakdown / acceptance + final markdown PRD).
* **OpenAI-compatible**: `POST /v1/chat/completions` accepts the standard OpenAI chat format. Use `model="flutter-agent"` to run the refinement pipeline, or any other model name to passthrough to the upstream provider.

schema.title: Response List Skills V1 Skills Get

get.summary: Get a single skill (incl. full markdown body)

post.summary: Hot-reload skill markdown files from disk

schema.title: Response Reload Skills V1 Skills Reload Post

post.summary: Dry-run the skill selection for a requirement (no model calls)
post.description:
Explain which skills would be injected for a requirement and why.

Runs the exact same ranker the pipeline uses (keyword scores, foundational
pinning, family de-dup, token budget) and returns every skill's score and
selection outcome — purely local, zero upstream tokens.

post.summary: Refine a Flutter requirement into spec / architecture / tasks
post.description: Run the multi-stage refinement pipeline against the configured upstream.

post.summary: Refine with live SSE progress (stage-by-stage events + final result)
post.description:
Run the pipeline while streaming progress events over SSE.

Stages can take tens of seconds each against a real upstream model; this
endpoint lets clients render live progress instead of a blank wait.

200.description: text/event-stream of JSON events: pipeline_start, stage_start, stage_complete (elapsed/usage/cost), cache_hit, done (full RefineResponse), error. Terminated by `data: [DONE]`.

post.summary: Discover (and optionally scaffold/distill) open-source dev signals

schema.title: Response List Runs V1 Runs Get

get.summary: Fetch the full RefineResponse for a given run id.

schema.title: Response Get Run V1 Runs  Run Id  Get

200.description: Either application/json (ChatCompletionResponse) or text/event-stream (OpenAI SSE deltas).

get.summary: Aggregate statistics across all recorded runs.

model.title: Model
model.description: Model alias. 'flutter-agent' runs the refinement pipeline.

pricing_source.title: Pricing Source
pricing_source.description: Which key in the pricing table matched ('*' = fallback).

CostBreakdown.title: CostBreakdown
CostBreakdown.description:
USD cost estimate (worst-case, no cache-hit discount).

Sourced from `flutter_agent.pricing.MODEL_PRICING`; override via the
``PRICING_CONFIG`` env var.

queries.title: Queries
queries.description: Watch-list queries; defaults to the built-in dev/coding watch-list.

sources.title: Sources
sources.description: Which sources to query: 'hf' (Hugging Face) and/or 'arxiv'.

only_new.title: Only New
only_new.description: Return (and scaffold/distill) only candidates not seen before.

scaffold.title: Scaffold
scaffold.description: Write a deterministic SKILL.md scaffold per candidate (0 tokens).

distill.title: Distill
distill.description: Fill each scaffold into a mature skill via the model. COSTS TOKENS and requires DEEPSEEK_API_KEY. Implies scaffolding to disk.

max_distill.title: Max Distill
max_distill.description: Cap model-distilled skills per call (token guard).

scaffold_dir.title: Scaffold Dir
scaffold_dir.description: Target directory for scaffolds / distilled skills; defaults to the served skills dir. Existing files are never clobbered.

commit.title: Commit
commit.description: Persist seen-keys so future calls only surface new candidates. Default off (read-only).

IngestRequest.title: IngestRequest
IngestRequest.description:
Discover open-source dev signals (Hugging Face models + arXiv papers).

Discovery and deterministic scaffolding cost **no** model tokens. Setting
``distill=true`` fills each scaffold's five cognitive layers via the model
and therefore **costs tokens** (and requires ``DEEPSEEK_API_KEY``).

scaffold_dir.title: Scaffold Dir
scaffold_dir.description: Directory the files were written to (if any).

ref.title: Ref
ref.description: Stable id within the source (model id / arxiv id).

IngestionCandidate.title: IngestionCandidate
IngestionCandidate.description: One discovered open-source artifact (model or paper).

bad_packages_total.title: Bad Packages Total
bad_packages_total.description: Total packages that failed pub.dev validation.

stage_success_rate.title: Stage Success Rate
stage_success_rate.description: Fraction of stages where stage_valid=True, keyed by stage name.

constraint_ok.title: Constraint Ok
constraint_ok.description: True/False if the constraint could be checked; null when unparseable.

PackageValidation.title: PackageValidation
PackageValidation.description: Result of looking up a recommended package on pub.dev.

requirement.title: Requirement
requirement.description: The raw user requirement (one liner or paragraph).

platforms.title: Platforms
platforms.description: Target platforms. Use ['auto'] to let the model decide.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: Override skill selection. If null, the classify stage decides. Pass skill ids, e.g. ['flutter-mobile','task-refinement'].

stages.title: Stages
stages.description: Which pipeline stages to run, in order.

extra_context.title: Extra Context
extra_context.description: Free-form extra context to append after the user requirement.

use_cache.title: Use Cache
use_cache.description: If true, reuse the most recent run with an identical input (requirement+skills+stages+temperature+max_tokens+model). Cache hits are returned with cached=true and skip the upstream call.

validate_packages.title: Validate Packages
validate_packages.description: If true, every entry in architecture.third_party is checked against pub.dev to catch hallucinated package names.

review_max_iterations.title: Review Max Iterations
review_max_iterations.description: Closed loop: when the review stage flags blocking findings (severity blocker/major or blocking=true), re-run implementation with the findings as feedback and re-review, up to this many extra passes. 0 disables the loop (review stays advisory).

review_block_severity.title: Review Block Severity
review_block_severity.description: Lowest finding severity that makes the review blocking. 'major' (default) blocks on blocker+major; 'blocker' only on blockers (loosest); 'minor' also blocks on minor (strictest). The model's explicit blocking=true always blocks regardless of this setting.

id.title: Id
id.description: Unique run id, also written to logs/runs.jsonl.

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: Epoch seconds when the run finished.

cache_key.title: Cache Key
cache_key.description: SHA-256 of the deterministic inputs; key used by the run cache.

cached.title: Cached
cached.description: True if this response was served from the run cache.

usage.description: Aggregated upstream token usage across all stages.

cost.description: Aggregated USD cost estimate across all stages.

review_iterations.title: Review Iterations
review_iterations.description: Number of extra implementation→review passes the closed loop ran because the review flagged blocking findings. 0 = first review passed or the loop was disabled.

review_history.title: Review History
review_history.description: Per-pass audit of the closed loop: one entry per review evaluation (first review + each re-review), with finding counts by severity and source. Empty when the review stage did not run.

acceptance_gaps.title: Acceptance Gaps
acceptance_gaps.description: Deterministic cross-check gaps between acceptance, breakdown and implementation (tasks missing acceptance criteria, test stubs not referenced by the test plan). Advisory; does not drive the loop.

validations.title: Validations
validations.description: pub.dev validation results for architecture.third_party packages.

iteration.title: Iteration
iteration.description: 0 = first review; 1+ = re-reviews driven by the loop.

blocking.title: Blocking
blocking.description: Whether this pass was judged blocking (drove a re-implement).

by_source.title: By Source
by_source.description: Finding counts keyed by source ('llm' vs 'static').

ReviewPass.title: ReviewPass
ReviewPass.description: One evaluation of the review stage inside the closed loop, for audit.

bad_packages.title: Bad Packages
bad_packages.description: How many recommended packages failed pub.dev validation.

RunSummary.title: RunSummary
RunSummary.description: Compact view of a past refinement run, returned by GET /v1/runs.

id.title: Id
id.description: Unique skill id, matches directory name.

extends.title: Extends
extends.description: Skill ids this skill deepens/specializes. The ranker treats self + targets as one family and de-duplicates so a broad parent and its narrow child do not both consume the token budget.

see_also.title: See Also
see_also.description: Related skill ids (cross-references; non-binding for ranking).

score.title: Score
score.description: Relevance score from the keyword ranker.

foundational.title: Foundational
foundational.description: Whether the skill was force-included as foundational.

family.title: Family
family.description: Family root when the skill belongs to an `extends` family.

estimated_tokens.title: Estimated Tokens
estimated_tokens.description: Rough token estimate of the skill body.

SkillRankItem.title: SkillRankItem
SkillRankItem.description: One skill's standing in the ranking.

requirement.title: Requirement
requirement.description: The raw user requirement to rank skills against.

platforms.title: Platforms
platforms.description: Target platforms. Use ['auto'] for the default set.

SkillRankRequest.title: SkillRankRequest
SkillRankRequest.description: Dry-run the skill selection for a requirement — no model calls.

foundational.title: Foundational
foundational.description: Skill ids force-included for this requirement.

selected.title: Selected
selected.description: Skill ids that survive ranking + budget trimming, in order.

ranked.title: Ranked
ranked.description: All skills with score / selection / family details.

SkillRankResponse.title: SkillRankResponse
SkillRankResponse.description: Explainable result of the skill selection dry-run.

id.title: Id
id.description: Unique skill id, matches directory name.

extends.title: Extends
extends.description: Skill ids this skill deepens/specializes. The ranker treats self + targets as one family and de-duplicates so a broad parent and its narrow child do not both consume the token budget.

see_also.title: See Also
see_also.description: Related skill ids (cross-references; non-binding for ranking).

SkillSummary.title: SkillSummary
SkillSummary.description: Skill metadata + path on disk; body is omitted to keep listings light.

attempts.title: Attempts
attempts.description: How many upstream calls this stage took (>1 means JSON repair was triggered).

repaired.title: Repaired
repaired.description: True if the stage's JSON was rescued by a repair retry.

stage_valid.title: Stage Valid
stage_valid.description: Whether the parsed JSON conforms to the expected stage schema.

validation_error.title: Validation Error
validation_error.description: Human-readable schema validation error, null when valid.

cost.description: USD cost estimate for this stage.

raw_output.title: Raw Output
raw_output.description: Raw model text for this stage.

parsed.title: Parsed
parsed.description: Best-effort JSON parse of raw_output. Null if not JSON.
